title: CVE-1999-0391 — CVSS 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-1999-0391

CVSS Score: 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 1999-01-05T05:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

The cryptographic challenge of SMB authentication in Windows 95 and Windows 98 can be reused, allowing an attacker to replay the response and impersonate a user.

References: https://marc.info/?l=bugtraq&m=91552769809542&w=2, https://marc.info/?l=bugtraq&m=91552769809542&w=2
